prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (the v1 EDC announcement poster) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in every structural element — same 9:16 portrait composition, same top-to-bottom layout (Cactus Clouds logo at top → 'NOW STOCKED AT / CACTUS CLOUDS' headline → gold MM emblem on daisy mandala over festival skyline → three Muha Meds boxes on glossy podium → bottom strip with collab lockup), same headline wording, same emblem placement, same box arrangement (Frozen Pomegranate left, Blue Slushie center, Galactic Diesel right), same EDC festival vibe, same 9:16 format.

TWO MODIFICATIONS — both surgical:

1) BOTTOM STRIP TEXT — remove the words 'LIMITED DROP'. The bottom strip should now read simply: 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+'. Same clean white all-caps typography, same chromatic rule above and the same Cactus Clouds × MM gold collab lockup below. Just delete the 'LIMITED DROP ·' segment so the bullet-separated line is just two items, properly centered.

2) PALETTE CLEAN-UP — the previous version has too many competing neon colors (acid green + cyan + magenta + yellow + violet + gold all fighting at once). RESTRICT THE PALETTE around the boxes and background to a TIGHT, COHESIVE THREE-COLOR SYSTEM, plus white for type:
   • DOMINANT: GOLD (matching the Muha Meds emblem). All radiating laser beams from the emblem, all glow halos, all rim-light on the headline, and the daisy mandala behind the emblem are now GOLD GRADIENT (rich amber → soft champagne → bright white core). Not multicolor — gold only.
   • SECONDARY NEON ACCENT: a SINGLE NEON PINK / HOT MAGENTA (one consistent hue, no purple variants). Used sparingly: a subtle pink uplight column behind the emblem (replacing the multicolor stage column), the outer ring of the daisy mandala in a single pink stroke, the chromatic-rule above the bottom strip becomes a clean thin solid hot-pink line (no rainbow), and the headline outline gets a single thin hot-pink stroke instead of the previous chromatic rim. Pink light particles drift faintly in the background.
   • BRAND ACCENT: a TIGHTLY-CONTROLLED GREEN (matching the Cactus Clouds logo's green outline) ONLY on the small neon cactus silhouettes flanking the boxes, and on the Cactus Clouds wordmark itself. Nowhere else.
   • BACKGROUND: deep midnight INDIGO / near-black, with the gold and pink glows. NO cyan, NO acid green except the cactus silhouettes, NO yellow (other than the daisy centers, which become gold), NO multicolor rainbow elements anywhere.
   • The EDC festival skyline silhouette (ferris wheel, stages) on the horizon should be drawn as clean dark silhouettes with only GOLD and HOT PINK accent lighting on them — not the previous multicolor stage lights.
   • The kandi-bead trails / particle confetti scattered across the frame should be filtered to GOLD and HOT PINK only (and a few white sparkles). Drop the cyan/green/yellow beads.
   • The DAISIES scattered around the boxes are simplified to MONOCHROMATIC NEON PINK petals with GOLD CENTERS — uniform, not mixed-color.

The three product boxes themselves KEEP THEIR ORIGINAL BRAND COLORS exactly as in the refs (Frozen Pomegranate's red, Blue Slushie's blue, Galactic Diesel's pink-purple gradients) — those internal box colors are protected. Only the SURROUNDING environment is restricted to the gold + hot pink + green-cactus-accent palette so the boxes pop cleanly without the background fighting them.

Do NOT modify anything else — same composition, same hero layout, same boxes (NO devices, NO vape pens, boxes only), same Cactus Clouds wordmark, same Muha Meds gold emblem, same skyline placement, same 9:16 format, same premium poster-grade quality, same bloom and glow rendering — just executed with the tighter palette and the updated bottom strip text.

Spelling check: 'CACTUS CLOUDS', 'MUHA MEDS', 'NOW STOCKED AT', 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+', 'BLUE SLUSHIE', 'FROZEN POMEGRANATE', 'GALACTIC DIESEL'. Clean, no typos. No 'LIMITED DROP' anywhere.
